one_time_description: Prior period adjustment: ISC carryforward of unexpended funding from 2018 year-end; 2021 accumulated surplus reduced by $40,000 deferred revenue
economic_notes: Real estate group includes Lake of the Woods Property LP, Texas Lake Property LP, Tree Lane LP, Union Bar Place LP. Forestry/timber rights income. BCFN Gaming revenue. Trans Mountain pipeline revenue.
notes: Auditor is sole practitioner Joseph W Martin CPA, not a firm. Nine consolidated subsidiaries including real estate LPs and GP corporations. Prior period adjustment reducing 2021 accumulated surplus by $40,000 for deferred ISC revenue. Land value $7,906,653 is largest tangible capital asset. Buildings $10,222,615 net book value. Member distributions dropped dramatically from $3,135,888 in 2021 to $147,108 in 2022. Funds held in trust for minors $393,432 offset by equal liability.
